original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which actor credited in Black Jesus connects the show to Charles Quinton Murphy? Evidence: Black Jesus (TV series): The series stars Gerald "Slink" Johnson, Charlie Murphy, Corey Holcomb, Kali Hawk, King Bach, and Andra Fuller. -> Charlie Murphy

Node 2: What television genre is associated with Charles Quinton Murphy's acting and writing work? Evidence: Charlie Murphy: Charles Quinton Murphy (July 12, 1959 - April 12, 2017) was an American actor, comedian, and writer. Murphy was best known as a writer and cast member of the Comedy Central sketch-comedy series "Chappelle's Show". -> Comedy
